ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the building */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the building is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the building is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the building */,
  "construction_start_date" TEXT /* Date when construction began */,
  "construction_end_date" TEXT /* Date when construction was completed */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager responsible for the building */,
  "total_floors" INTEGER /* Total number of floors in the building */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the building (e.g., under construction, completed) */,
  "blueprint_file" TEXT /* Path to the blueprint file of the building */,
  "material_specifications_file" TEXT /* Path to the material specifications file of the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the room belongs to */,
  "room_name" TEXT /* Name of the room (e.g., Hall, Dining room, Living room) */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the room (e.g., 1st level/Ground floor) */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the room (e.g., 10'1" X 10'5") */,
  "flooring" TEXT /* Type of flooring in the room (e.g., Concrete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the room */,
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room type */,
  "flooring_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flooring type */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the room in square feet */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the room in cubic feet */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the room details were last modified */,
  "blueprint_file" TEXT /* Path to the blueprint file of the room */,
  "material_specifications_file" TEXT /* Path to the material specifications file of the room */,
  "occupancy_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people the room can hold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_room_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_type_id") REFERENCES room_types ("room_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_flooring_id FOREIGN KEY ("flooring_id") REFERENCES room_flooring ("flooring_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_types" (
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room type */,
  "room_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the room type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the room type */,
  "is_residential" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the room type is residential */,
  "is_commercial" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the room type is commercial */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the room type is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_flooring" (
  "flooring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flooring type */,
  "flooring_name" TEXT /* Name of the flooring type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flooring type */,
  "durability" TEXT /* Durability rating of the flooring */,
  "cost_per_square_foot" TEXT /* Cost per square foot of the flooring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flooring_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., architect, engineer, contractor, client) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
